text:
Example 3.1: Calculate hydrostatic pressure at 100m depth in seawater.
Given: rho = 1025 kg/m³, g = 9.81 m/s², d = 100 m
Solution: P = 1025 × 9.81 × 100 = 1,005,525 Pa ≈ 1005.5 kPa

Example 5.2: Determine buoyancy force on a 2m³ submerged object.
Given: rho = 1025 kg/m³, g = 9.81 m/s², V = 2 m³
Solution: F_b = 1025 × 9.81 × 2 = 20,110.5 N ≈ 20.1 kN
